description: CompositionRed shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% Lycra, has cap sleeves, a spread collar, buttoned placket, ruffles along the placket up to the midriff and a curved hemFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryTake formal dressing to the next level with this purple shirt from arrow. This colour suits all occasions, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with formal pants and leather slip-on shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and tennis shoes for a semi-formal vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
